contentSummary.videoStrategy: High-volume video content across product pages, with flagship product categories (ZERUP, CHUNKY FLAVOUR) featuring maximum video richness

heroBanner.description: Clean, modern D2C fitness brand aesthetic with product-focused imagery. Bright, fresh design reflecting contemporary health/nutrition positioning.
heroBanner.brandIdentityNote: Modern, youthful design approach contrasts with ESN's dark/elite aesthetic. Emphasizes accessibility and trendy nutrition culture.

pages.designNote: Video-rich flagship product page (3 videos + 3 images). Maximum multimedia emphasis for core product line. Hero + banners + 3 videos + grid.

Features hero, category messaging, sub-category navigation, and product grid.

pages.designNote: Specialized protein sub-category: hero + supporting content + 1 video + grid. Unique product format differentiator.

pages.designNote: Pure product grid page with no editorial content - functional catalog view of all products.

heroBanner.description: Product selector/finder tool with guided shopping UI

pages.designNote: Interactive tool page with minimal branding (1 image). Guided product discovery/quiz format helping customers identify right product. Unique D2C engagement strategy.

colorScheme.rationale: Clean, bright aesthetic conveys modernity, accessibility, and health-conscious positioning. Contrasts with ESN's dark/elite approach.

typography.primary: Modern sans-serif, mixed case for categories and sub-brands
typography.characteristics: Contemporary, friendly, approachable. Balances professionalism with youthful energy.

photography.lighting: Bright, clean, contemporary styling emphasizing product quality and lifestyle aspirations
photography.subjects: Products, lifestyle imagery, fitness/wellness content, modern aesthetic

layoutPatterns.homepage: Narrow divider (872x65) + large hero (3000x1500) + divider (872x218) + narrow category grid (8x436x218) + mid-width promotional (750x375) + bottom divider (872x174)
layoutPatterns.categoryPages: Consistent hero (1872x400) + supporting banners (1-2) + product grid
layoutPatterns.subBrandPages: Hero banner (1872x400) + supporting content + 0-1 videos + product grid
layoutPatterns.flagshipPages: Hero + multiple supporting banners + 3 videos (maximum multimedia strategy) for ZERUP and CHUNKY FLAVOUR

hierarchyStructure.navigationDepth: 2 levels - main categories + specialized sub-categories under PROTEINE
hierarchyStructure.distribution: Concentrated video strategy (13 total videos, 0.87 videos/page average)
hierarchyStructure.strategy: ZERUP and CHUNKY FLAVOUR receive disproportionate multimedia investment. PROTEINE has 5 specialized sub-categories enabling product differentiation within protein category.

distribution.rationale: Homepage with diverse layout elements - hero + navigation structure + promotional content
Flagship product - maximum video investment showcasing product benefits, usage, and lifestyle positioning
Flagship product - maximum video investment for core product category
Popular products category - substantial editorial content with 1 video feature
Core product category - comprehensive content depth with category positioning

distribution.page: Protein sub-categories (5 total: PROTEIN MILKSHAKE, PROTEIN ICED COFFEE, CLEAR PROTEIN, CLEAR GLOW PEPTIDES, VEGAN PROTEIN)
distribution.rationale: Specialized product type pages - template consistency with targeted positioning for each segment

distribution.page: Other category pages (RIEGEL & LIGHT FOOD, VITALSTOFFE, BUNDLE)
distribution.rationale: Secondary categories - minimal but focused editorial
Pure product grid - functional catalog view
Interactive guided shopping tool - minimal editorial, focus on functionality

brandIdentity.visualLanguage: Clean, bright, modern aesthetic with product-forward photography. Contemporary design language appeals to younger, trend-conscious fitness and wellness consumers. Emphasis on innovation, taste/experience, and lifestyle integration rather than elite athletic positioning.
brandIdentity.targetAudience: Fitness-conscious millennials and Gen Z, wellness-focused consumers, trend-conscious nutrition shoppers, broader demographic including women interested in wellness/beauty (CLEAR GLOW PEPTIDES positioning)
brandIdentity.navigationPhilosophy: Specialized depth in protein category (5 sub-categories: PROTEIN MILKSHAKE, PROTEIN ICED COFFEE, CLEAR PROTEIN, CLEAR GLOW PEPTIDES, VEGAN PROTEIN) enabling targeted positioning for different consumption contexts and consumer segments. Flagship products (ZERUP, CHUNKY FLAVOUR) receive maximum multimedia/video investment (3 videos each). Strong D2C DNA with PRODUKTSELEKTOR guided shopping tool.

differences: ESN: Dark/elite aesthetic vs MORE: Clean/modern aesthetic
ESN: Minimal video (6 total) vs MORE: Heavy video strategy (13 total)
ESN: 75 editorial images vs MORE: 53 editorial images (more efficient distribution)
ESN: 21 pages with sparse specialization vs MORE: 15 pages with dense video/media investment
ESN: Sports photography focus vs MORE: Product/lifestyle photography focus
MORE: Unique beauty/wellness angle (CLEAR GLOW PEPTIDES) vs ESN: Purely performance-focused
MORE: Flagship product hero status (ZERUP, CHUNKY FLAVOUR) vs ESN: Distributed editorial strategy

notableFeatures.videoStrategy: Aggressive multimedia approach with 13 unique videos across 15 pages. ZERUP and CHUNKY FLAVOUR pages serve as video-rich content hubs (3 videos each), suggesting these are flagship products receiving maximum marketing investment.
notableFeatures.proteinSubcategories: Five specialized protein categories (PROTEIN MILKSHAKE, PROTEIN ICED COFFEE, CLEAR PROTEIN, CLEAR GLOW PEPTIDES, VEGAN PROTEIN) enable segmentation by consumption context (drinkable, iced/functional beverage, clear/clean, beauty/wellness, plant-based) - more granular than ESN's approach.
notableFeatures.beautyWellnessAngle: CLEAR GLOW PEPTIDES positioning targets beauty/wellness/collagen market segment, expanding addressable market beyond traditional fitness athletes.
notableFeatures.productSelectorTool: PRODUKTSELEKTOR appears to be guided shopping tool (quiz or product finder) - same concept as ESN but different implementation.
notableFeatures.d2cBranding: Founded by Christian Wolf, strong D2C fitness brand with contemporary design philosophy and trend-responsive product innovation (ZERUP, CHUNKY FLAVOUR names reflect consumer taste preferences).
notableFeatures.mediaEfficiency: Fewer total editorial images (53 vs 75) but higher video count (13 vs 6) suggests deliberate shift from image-heavy to video-heavy content strategy, aligned with modern consumer preferences and social media marketing trends.
